changes_made: Changed k8s_ingress_whitelist_ip_ranges to k8s_ingress_whitelist_specific_ip_ranges for specificity
review_notes: The functions generally map well to Kubernetes security controls related to limiting external network connections. However, some naming improvements were made for clarity and specificity. The changes ensure the function names are more descriptive and align better with the intent of the control.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | access points limit the number of external network connect
step1_reasoning: The control SC-7(3) focuses on limiting external network connections, which can be directly mapped to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies and service configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce default deny rules for ingress and restrict access to specific IP ranges, effectively controlling external access. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and configuring Ingress resources to whitelist specific IP ranges further aligns with the control's intent to limit external network connections.
